rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EUGENE P. COVELLO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/27/19: Please: 1. File points and authorities for the payment of community debts from the Estate. The Petition states that all of Decedent's assets were his separate property (Par. 14 & 17). The I&A, as corrected, does not specify whether the assets were community or separate property. 2. Explain why only 1/4 of the BofA Core Checking account is included as an asset of the Estate. The account statement shows that title to the entire account is vested in the Estate of Eugene P. Covello. Endorsed-filed copies of all responsive pleadings must be received in Room 202 no later than 3/20/19.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HELEN MOGCK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the cash found in the wallet was never inventoried, there was no disclosure regarding whether notice to the DHCS was required for a predeceased spouse, the attorney's costs for electronic filing fees were not itemized, cash should be shown as one amount (not the balance held at each separate financial institution) such that the proposed distribution is for the net amount of cash plus other specifically described assets, not for the net FMV of all assets, and the format of the pleadings do not comport with CRC 2.110(a).
